Motivation
Optimize bmm_batch_invariant op.
Current impl of bmm_batch_invariant sequentially calls matmul_persistent to do matmul in the batch.
Here we provide a new triton kernel bmm_kernel_persistent which parallelizes the matmul in the batch while keeping batch_invariant.

sglang.title: [Bug] Fix NSA Backend KV-Buffer Shape Mismatch in DeepSeek-V3.2
sglang.author: Johnsonms
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix this issue #12643

Root Cause:
The override_kv_cache_dim calculation in NSATokenToKVPool.init() was using the wrong dtype size for the rope dimension
storage. It was using dtype.itemsize (which for fp8 is 1 byte), but the
rope dimension is actually stored in bfloat16 format (2 bytes),

sglang.title: [NVIDIA] Fix wrong symmetric sizes for fp4 cases
sglang.author: kaixih
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The recent changes seem to have broken the FP4 use cases.
The root cause is that the output shape of MoE should not be assumed to match the input, since FP4 inputs are stored in a packed format while the outputs are typically in higher precision (e.g., BF16).
People might see errors like

Tuned kernel configs by leveraging nvMatmulHeuristics

Context on Swap-AB Optimization
For the 5th-generation Tensor Core (tcgen05.mma) instruction on SM100, the support

vllm.title: [PERF] Decouple projections from GDN custom op
vllm.author: vadiklyutiy
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR is refactoring of GDN.
The main goal is to allow wider using of torch.compile.

Separated forward pass of GDN attention into three distinct pieces: Input Projection, Core Attention, Output Projection. Before projections was in the GDN custom op and were not covered by torch.compile.

vllm.title: [model] Add support for openPangu_Ultra_MoE

vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose

FIX #27019
Test Plan
Test for openPangu-Ultra-MoE-718B-V1.1
Start serving:
vllm serve $LOCAL_CKPT_DIR/openPangu-Ultra-MoE-718B-V1.1 \ --data-parallel-size 4 \ --data-parallel-size-local 1 \ --data-parallel-start-rank $NODE_RANK \ --data-parallel-add

vllm.title: [PerfFix] Avoid separate thread for MP executor shm spin
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#26866 included a change to MultiprocExecutor to always busy-wait on the shm message queue from a separate thread, even when async scheduling and pipeline parallel aren't used.
This appears to have drastic performance consequences, possibly due to CPU contention / context switches of the spin with c

vllm.title: [AsyncScheduling] Don't schedule past request max_tokens
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Async scheduling was introduced in #19970 which included this comment, but there wasn't a corresponding length check.
Without this change we're scheduling one more step than necessary for requests that finish due to max_tokens length.
Thanks to @WoosukKwon for making me aware of this!

vllm.title: Remove deprecated `--rope-scaling` and `--rope-theta`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
These have been deprecated for a year (since #5836) so we should remove them.
This cleanup is a prerequisite to supporting Transformers v5 style RoPE configuration (per layer type).

vllm.title: [ROCm][Perf] New design on ROCm AITER MHA backend Implementation
vllm.author: ganyi1996ppo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The current AiterFlashAttentionImpl fetches K/V every run, which creates unnecessary memory pressure and non-trivial latency—especially with long prompts. This PR:

Removes redundant KV fetches from the attention backend
Introduces a phase-aware execution (decode, pure prefill, chunk prefill

vllm.title: Added disable rule to track files under benchmarks/lib
vllm.author: nadavkluger
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix .gitignore rule that unintentionally excludes vllm/benchmarks/lib
The .gitignore currently contains an unanchored pattern:
lib/
This pattern ignores any directory named lib at any depth, not just the build output directory at the repository root.
As a result, all files under vllm/benchmarks/lib/
